original_query: select deptno c, min(y), max(z) z, sum(r), sum(m) n, sum(x) sal from (    select deptno, ename, sum(sal) x, max(sal) z,       min(sal) y, count(hiredate) m, count(mgr) r    from emp group by deptno, ename) t group by deptno;
rewritten_query: select deptno c, min(y), max(z) z, sum(r), sum(m) n, sum(x) sal from (    select deptno, ename, sum(sal) x, max(sal) z,       min(sal) y, count(hiredate) m, count(mgr) r    from emp group by deptno, ename) t group by deptno;
